title: Arcana Kernel Method Status
subtitle: Which methods are implemented vs stubbed; demand-driven by KyberBot adoption
purpose: Tracks the demand-driven implementation trail. Each method is either stubbed (throws NotImplementedError) or implemented with a real body. The 'driven_by' field names the consumer module that triggered the implementation.

status_legend.label: Not in Arcana yet — identified gap, not even stubbed

methods.name: storeMemory
methods.scope_notes: canonical row write only; chunking/embedding/extraction deferred

methods.name: [createArcana vector-optional]
methods.notes: ArcanaOptions.vector is now optional. createMissingVectorStore() fallback added — same pattern as scheduler/queue stubs. Callers (including KyberBot) do not need to wire a VectorStore to construct an Arcana instance.

methods.name: [arcana-provider-sqlite-vec]
methods.notes: VectorStore via vec0 virtual table; rowid_ref companion pattern; :memory: testing; 11 tests. New package added v0.1.1. Unblocks hybridSearch when FTS5 tables also in StructuredStore.

methods.name: hybridSearch
methods.notes: requires sqlite-vec provider + FTS5 tables in StructuredStore; next after publish unblocked. read parity still partial until this lands.

methods.name: factRetrieval
methods.scope_notes: structured-only text-match; scores by word-hit ratio; annotates with why field; hybridSearch path deferred until sqlite-vec + FTS5 ready. NOTE: expiresAt/surprisalScore/lastReinforcedAt are in FactSchema (contracts) but not yet surfaced in this path.

methods.name: getEntityProfile
methods.scope_notes: assembles from live facts/insights/neighbors; stores result; returns from storage on second call; QueryResult envelope

methods.name: queryFacts (asOf timeline)
methods.notes: NOT in Arcana at all. Identified in ADR 008 as a missing kernel method. queryFacts currently has no date-filtering parameter. Timeline query (queryFacts with asOf: Date) is needed for Brain migration scenarios. Will require StructuredStore.getFactsForEntity to accept a temporal filter.

methods.name: runSleepPipeline
methods.notes: 13-step pipeline; entirely stubbed. expiresAt/surprisalScore/lastReinforcedAt are in FactSchema contracts but the sleep steps that would use them (decay scoring, expiry sweeps) are not implemented. Lands with sleep modules (#11).

methods.name: queryFacts
methods.driven_by: ADR 004 schema correction (in anticipation of KyberBot module #4 + Kybernesis Brain fact pipeline)
methods.notes: Reads via structured.getFactsForEntity; wraps in fresh QueryResult envelope. Sentence-form and triple-decomposed facts both queryable.

methods.name: listContradictions
methods.notes: provider-level surface exists; kernel-level facade not yet exposed

methods.name: deleteEntity
methods.notes: added deleteEntity to StructuredStore interface as part of this work (additive contract change — ADR 002)

methods.name: linkNodes
methods.notes: renamed from linkMemories per ADR 001 (name disagreed with NodeRef signature)

methods.name: recordFact
methods.driven_by: ADR 004 schema correction (in anticipation of KyberBot module #4 + Kybernesis Brain fact pipeline)
methods.notes: Validates RecordFactInput via FactSchema; builds Fact with UUID id + ISO createdAt + isLatest=true defaults; persists via structured.storeFact. Auto-supersession deferred to sleep pipeline.

methods.name: updateMemory
methods.driven_by: ADR 005 (memory is not append-only; David's architectural audit)
methods.notes: Partial update; contentHash recomputed when content changes; scopes replaced not merged. Unblocks pin/moveToTier (now wrappers around this) and the DVR-UT-006 orphan-mirror fix.

methods.name: markFactSuperseded
methods.notes: Pure-link op: updates isLatest=false + supersededBy=newFactId on the old fact. New fact must already exist (typically via recordFact). ADR 006.

methods.name: storeContradiction
methods.notes: Kernel mints id + createdAt; status defaults 'pending'; rationale optional. ADR 006.

methods.name: markMemorySuperseded
methods.driven_by: ADR 007 §3.2 (Brain-vs-Convex audit revealed memory-level supersession as a genuine domain feature)
methods.notes: Pure-link op mirroring markFactSuperseded: updates isLatest=false + supersededBy=newMemoryId on the old memory. New memory must already exist (typically via ingest.storeMemory). ADR 007.

summary.arcana_config_merge: arcana-config package DELETED 2026-05-19; merged into arcana-core src/config/. loadConfig/getDefaultConfig/ENV_MAP/ConfigSchema now exported from @kybernesis/arcana-core.
provider_bug_fixes: DVR-EC-001 (2026-05-19): arcana-provider-libsql connect() now mkdirSync(parent, {recursive:true}) before opening file-path database — fixes crash when data directory does not yet exist
summary.delivery_review_status: CONDITIONAL PASS r2 (2026-05-20). EC-015 in-flight guard needed before merge. EC-013/014 optional. 4 KyberBot-side patches still remaining.
kyberbot_remaining_patches: EC-015: in-flight guard needed (required before merge)
DVR-EC-002: temperature/maxTokens honesty in ClaudeLLMProvider — drop at type boundary with Omit + comment, or wire through CLI flags
DVR-BH-002/EC-006: OPENAI_API_KEY guard — wrap in try/catch or gate behind arcana.enabled flag
DVR-CQ-002/UT-005: extract bootArcana(root) from run.ts + add integration test
DVR-EC-007/BH-003: arcana-singleton double-init fix — dispose-then-reinit or throw on second call
contracts_ahead_of_kernel: expiresAt, surprisalScore, lastReinforcedAt — in FactSchema but not surfaced in any kernel method or sleep pipeline step
brain_migration_blockers: Kybernesis Brain must shed 5 Convex artifacts before adopting Arcana
loose enum vocab (must align with Arcana scopes)
reactive query patterns (Arcana is pull-only, no live queries)
contract_evolutions: v0.1.0 initial schema (FactSchema required triples, no updateMemory)
v0.x: FactSchema corrected — fact (sentence) required, attribute/value optional (ADR 004 supersedes ADR 003)
v0.x: updateMemory added to StructuredStore + command (ADR 005 — Memory is not append-only; unblocks pin/moveToTier and DVR-UT-006 orphan-mirror fix)
v0.x: markFactSuperseded + storeContradiction added; Contradiction.rationale added; correctFact stub deleted (ADR 006 — driven by kyberbot module #11)
v0.x: Memory.status + Memory.isLatest + Memory.supersededBy fields added; markMemorySuperseded kernel + provider method added (ADR 007 §3.1-§3.2 — driven by Brain-vs-Convex audit)
v0.x ADR 008: Brain migration analysis — confirmed expiresAt/surprisalScore/lastReinforcedAt in contracts; identified timeline query as missing kernel method; classified brain vs harness features
